meaning: adj.謔｣逞ʒ噪,雍･蝮冗噪,譛臥羅
examples: His diseased bladder left him incontinent.
In his diseased ravings he called himself the Prince of Wales, and bravely doth he keep up the character.
The arteries are diseased and a transplant is the only hope.
An attempt to get Mr Reeves' diseased remaining kidney to work was also doomed.
The trust had questioned the cull's effectiveness, though farmers losing diseased stock wanted action.
